metaDescription: Get the Sentroy desktop app for macOS, Windows and Linux — your whole workspace in a fast native window.
title: Get Sentroy on your desktop
subtitle: A fast, native window for your whole Sentroy workspace — mail, storage, auth and your apps.
mobileDesc: Install Sentroy to your home screen and open it like a native app.
mobileManual: Open the Share menu and choose "Add to Home Screen".
promoMobileDesc: Install it to your home screen, open it like an app.
